hero.badge: Hola imali engenayo ngendawo yakho yokupaka
hero.title: Guqula Indawo Yakho Ibe Imali Yangempela
hero.sub: Faka indawo yakho yokupaka ku-Space Park futhi uhole imali njalo uma kukhona opaka kuyo. Ukuhlaziywa kwesikhathi sangempela, izinkokhelo ezizenzakalelayo, nokulawula okuphelele — konke kudeshibhodi yakho yozakwethu.

process.title: Iqala ngezinyathelo ezi-3
process.sub: Faka indawo yakho yokupaka ohlwini bese uqala ukuhola — akukho buchwepheshe obudingekayo

step1.label: Isinyathelo soku-1
step1.title: Hambisa Isicelo Sakho
step1.desc: Gcwalisa imininingwane yendawo yakho, phini indawo yakho kumephu, bese ulayisha ubufakazi bobunikazi — kuthatha iminithi engaphansi kwe-5.

step2.label: Isinyathelo sesi-2
step2.title: Gunyazwa Ezinsukwini Ezimbalwa
step2.desc: Ithimba lethu libuyekeza phakathi kwezinsuku zokusebenza ezingu-2-5. Hlola isimo sakho nge-ID yakho yesicelo. Uzothola imininingwane yokungena nge-imeyili.

step3.label: Isinyathelo sesi-3
step3.title: Hola Ngokuzenzakalelayo
step3.desc: Indawo yakho iqala ukusebenza ngokushesha. Gada imali oyiholayo, amaseshini, nokusebenza kudeshibhodi yakho ezinikele yozakwethu.

card1.title: Gcina u-90% Wemali Oyiholele
card1.desc: Sikhokhisa ikhomishini ecacile engu-10% — azikho izimali ezifihliwe, azikho izindleko zokusetha, azikho izinkokhelo zanyanga zonke. Okuholayo kungokwakho.

card2.title: Ukuhlaziywa Kwesikhathi Sangempela
card2.desc: Gada amazinga okuhlala, umlando wamaseshini, nemali engenayo yansuku zonke ngedeshibhodi yozakwethu enhle neyakhelwe injongo.

card3.title: Izinkokhelo Zasebhange Ezizenzakalelayo
card3.desc: Xhumanisa i-akhawunti yakho yasebhange kanye bese uthola amadiphozi azenzakalelayo — akukho nqubo yokukhipha imali edingekayo.

card4.title: Ukubonakala Kwe-App Ngokushesha
card4.desc: Indawo yakho ivela kuhlelo lokusebenza lweselula lwe-Space Park ngomzuzu igunyazwa, ibonakala ezinkulungwaneni zabashayeli abafuna indawo yokupaka nsuku zonke.

card5.title: Kuqinisekisiwe Futhi Kuthenjiwe
card5.desc: Yonke indawo efakwe ohlwini iqinisekiswa ithimba lethu, okunikeza abashayeli ukuzethemba futhi kuqhube ukuhlala okuphezulu endaweni yakho.

card6.title: Ukuphathwa Kokuzisiza
card6.desc: Buyekeza inani lakho lehora, amahora okusebenza, nemininingwane yendawo kudeshibhodi yakho noma nini, ngaphandle kokudinga ukuxhumana nosekelo.

mobile.title: Abashayeli Bakuthola ku-Space Park
mobile.sub: Indawo yakho efakwe ohlwini ibonakala ngokushesha kubashayeli abasebenzisa i-app ye-Space Park — sesha, paka, futhi ukhokhe konke endaweni eyodwa.

card1.title: Thola Indawo Yokupaka
card1.desc: Abashayeli bafuna izindawo ezitholakalayo eduze nendawo abaya kuyo ngesikhathi sangempela.

card2.title: Inkokhelo Engenamali
card2.desc: Seshini ngayinye ivuselelwa ngedijithali — asikho isidingo sokuphatha ukheshi ngakolwakho uhlangothi.

card3.title: Ukulandelela Iseshini
card3.desc: Qala, nweba, futhi uqedele amaseshini okupaka kusuka ku-app ngomlando ophelele wokucwaninga.

card4.title: Izaziso Ezisheshayo
card4.desc: Abashayeli bathola izikhumbuzi futhi uthola izexwayiso zeseshini — kwenziwa ngokuzenzakalelayo ngokukhululekile.

cta.title: Usukulungele Ukuqala Ukuhola?
cta.sub: Joyina amakhulu abanikazi bezindawo zokupaka asebevele behola imali ku-Space Park. Izindleko eziyiziro zokufaka isicelo.

contact.title: Unemibuzo?
contact.sub: Hambisa noma yimiphi imibuzo onayo futhi ithimba lethu lizobuyela kuwe.

footer.desc: Indlela ehlakaniphile yokwenza imali ngendawo yakho yokupaka. Xhuma nezinkulungwane zabashayeli futhi uhole ngokuzenzakalelayo.

apply.title: Faka Isicelo Sokubhala Indawo Yakho
apply.subtitle: Gcwalisa ifomu elingezansi ukuze uthole indawo yakho yokupaka ku-Jambo Parking

zone.title: Imininingwane Yendawo
zone.name: Igama Lendawo Elihlongozwayo
zone.instructionsPlaceholder: Abashayeli kufanele bayithole kanjani noma bangene kanjani kule ndawo?

map.title: Phina Indawo Yakho Yendawo
map.sub: Chofoza kumephu ukuze ubeke iphini ncamashi lapho indawo yakho yokupaka ikhona.

review.title: Buyekeza Futhi Uhambise
review.sub: Layisha ubufakazi bobunikazi (YIMPUBELELO), bese uhambisa isicelo sakho.

error.personal: Sicela ugcwalise yonke imininingwane yomuntu siqu.
error.pin: Sicela uchofoze kumephu ukuze ubeke indawo yakho.
error.upload: Sicela ulayishe ubufakazi bobunikazi (PNG, JPG noma PDF).
error.terms_text: Ngokufaka indawo yakho ku-Space Park, uvumelana nalokhu okulandelayo:

terms_list.accuracy: Ukunemba: Siqinisekisa ukuthi lonke ulwazi olunikeziwe mayelana nendawo (indawo, amanani, izikhala) lunembile.
terms_list.ownership: Ubunikazi: Siqinisekisa ukuthi unomnikazi noma unegunya elisemthethweni lokuqashisa/ukufaka indawo yokupaka.
terms_list.safety: Ukuphepha: Ubhekene nokuqinisekisa ukuthi indawo iphephile, iyatholakala, futhi iyakekelwa.
terms_list.compliance: Ukuthobela: Uyavuma ukuthobela yonke imithetho yendawo neziqondiso mayelana nokupaka nokusebenza kwebhizinisi.
terms_list.fees: Izimali Zenkundla: Uyavuma isakhiwo sekhomishini yenkundla kukho konke ukubhukha okwenziwa nge-Space Park.
terms_list.termination: Ukunqanyulwa: I-Space Park inelungelo lokumisa noma lokususa noma yiluphi uhlu oluphula le migomo.

addZone.title: Faka Indawo Entsha
addZone.sub: Hambisa isicelo sokwengeza enye indawo yokupaka ngaphansi kwe-akhawunti yakho.
addZone.subtitle: Thumela isicelo sokwengeza enye indawo yokupaka ngaphansi kwe-akhawunti yakho.
addZone.successMsg: Impumelelo! Isicelo sakho sendawo ({{id}}) sihambisile futhi sisalindele ukugunyazwa.

form.name: Igama Lendawo Elihlongozwayo
form.mapSub: Chofoza noma yikuphi kumephu ukuze ubeke indawo yakho yokupaka ngokunembile.

mapLocation.label: Phina Indawo Kumephu
mapLocation.instruction: Chofoza noma yikuphi kumephu ukuze ubeke indawo yakho yokupaka ngokunembile.

login.title: Ingosi Yozakwethu
login.subtitle: Ngena ngemvume ukuze uphathe indawo yakho yokupaka
login.error: Ukungena kuhlulekile. Sicela uhlole imininingwane yakho.

dashboard.title: Ideshibhodi
dashboard.welcome: Siyakwamukela futhi! Bheka ukuthi indawo yakho isebenza kanjani.

charts.noData: Ayikho idatha yokuholwayo okwamanje. Izovela lapha uma amaseshini eseqediwe.

table.noSessions: Awekho amaseshini okwamanje. Azovela lapha uma abashayeli beqala ukupaka.

success.title: Isicelo Sithunyelwe!
success.subtitle: Isicelo sakho sendawo sitholiwe. Ithimba lethu lizosibuyekeza ezinsukwini zokusebenza ezingu-2-5 futhi uzokwaziswa nge-imeyili.
success.saveIdTip: Gcina le-ID — uzoyidinga ukuze uhlole isimo sesicelo sakho

status.title: Hlola Isimo Sesicelo
status.subtitle: Faka i-ID yakho yesicelo ukuze ubone isimo sakho samanje
status.label: I-ID Yesicelo

error.notFound: Asikho isicelo esitholiwe ngale-ID. Sicela uhlole uzame futhi.
error.generic: Kukhona okungahambanga kahle. Sicela uzame futhi.

pending.label: Isabuyekezwa
pending.msg: Isicelo sakho sisabuyekezwa ithimba lethu. Lokhu kuvame ukuthatha izinsuku ezingu-2-5.

approved.label: Samukeliwe
approved.msg: Siyakuhalalisela! Indawo yakho yamukeliwe futhi isiyasebenza. Hlola i-imeyili yakho ngezitifiketi zokungena.

rejected.label: Asamukelwanga
rejected.msg: Ngeshwa isicelo sakho asiwashongo kulesi sikhathi. Sicela uhlole amanothi noma uxhumane nosekelo.

bank.title: Imininingwane Yasebhange
bank.subtitle: Phatha i-akhawunti yakho ukuze uthole izinkokhelo
bank.info: Lolu lwazi lugcinwe luphephile futhi lusetshenziselwa kuphela ukufaka imali oyiholayo.

password.title: Shintsha Iphasiwedi
password.subtitle: Buyekeza iphasiwedi yakho ukuze ugcine i-akhawunti yakho iphephile
password.tip: Ngemuva kokushintsha iphasiwedi yakho, kuzodingeka ungene ngemvume futhi kuwo wonke amadivayisi akho.

error.length: Iphasiwedi kufanele okungenani ibe nezinhlamvu ezingu-8.

howItWorks.title: Indlela u-Space Park Osebenza Ngayo
howItWorks.subtitle: U-Space Park uxhumanisa abanikazi bezindawo zokupaka ezizimele nabashayeli abadinga indawo yokupaka ethembekile. Nansi indlela uhlelo lwakho lusebenza ngayo.

1.title: Hambisa Isicelo Sakho
1.desc: Gcwalisa ifomu elifushane ngemininingwane yakho neyendawo — igama, ikheli, izindawo kanye nenani lehora elihlongozwayo. Phina indawo ncamashi kumephu. Kuthatha imizuzu engaphansi kwe-5.

2.title: Ukubuyekezwa Kwesicelo
2.desc: Ithimba lethu liqinisekisa isicelo sakho ezinsukwini ezingu-2-5. Singase sikuthinte ukuze siqinisekise ubunikazi. Landelela isimo nge-ID yakho.

3.title: Ukuvunyelwa & Ukusebenza
3.desc: Uma sesikuvumile, indawo yakho iyadalwa futhi ibonakale kubashayeli ku-app. Uzothola i-imeyili yokuqinisekisa ukungena kwakho.

4.title: Setha Amakhredithi Okukhokha
4.desc: Uma ungena okokuqala, faka imininingwane yakho yasebhange. Yilapho okuholayo kuzongena khona ngokuzenzakalelayo — akukho okokukhipha imali okwenziwa mathupha.

5.title: Gada Imali Oyiholayo
5.desc: Sebenzisa Ideshibhodi Yozakwethu ukuze ubone ukuhlala kwesikhathi sangempela, umlando, imali oyiholayo nezibalo zokusebenza ngamagrafu.

6.title: Thola Inkokhelo Yakho
6.desc: Izinzuzo zeseshini ngayinye zibalwa ngokuzenzakalelayo, ikhomishini yethu idonswa ngokukhululekile, kanti okunye kufakwa kwi-akhawunti yakho yasebhange.

faq.title: Imibuzo Evame Ukubuzwa
faq.a1: I-Space Park igcina u-10% wekhomishini kuseshini ngayinye. Uzothola u-90% wakho konke okuholiwe. Ikhomishini ibonakala kudeshibhodi yakho.
faq.a2: Imali engenayo ifakwa kwi-akhawunti yakho njalo — kuvame ukuba ezinsukwini zokusebenza ezingu-3-5 emva kokuqedwa kweseshini.
faq.a3: Yebo! Uhlongoza inani lakho ngesikhathi ufaka isicelo. Uma sekuvunyelwe, ungaxhumana nosekelo ukuze ulishintshe noma nini.
faq.q4: Kwenzekani uma umshayeli edala umonakalo endaweni yami?
faq.a4: Iseshini ngayinye irekhodwa ngemininingwane yemoto nesikhathi. Ithimba lethu losekelo liyasiza ekuxazululeni imibango.
faq.a5: Abashayeli babona indawo yakho kumephu, bahlole ukutholakala kwesikhathi sangempela, bakhokhe ngedijithali — ngaphandle kokheshi.
faq.a6: Yebo — xhumana nosekelo noma uthumele i-imeyili ku-support@spacepark.com ukuze uvale indawo yakho okwesikhashana ngaphandle kokulahlekelwa yi-akhawunti yakho.

privacy.title: Inqubomgomo Yobumfihlo
privacy.date: Idethi Yokusebenza: 9 uNhlolanja 2026 · Kugcine Ukubuyekezwa: 9 uNhlolanja 2026

s1.title: 1. Isingeniso
s1.content: Sizibophezele ekuvikeleni ubumfihlo bakho nokuqinisekisa ukuthi imininingwane yakho iphephile. Le nqubomgomo ichaza indlela esiqoqa ngayo, esisebenzisa ngayo, nalesivikela ngayo idatha yakho.

s2.title: 2. Idatha Esiyiqoqayo
s2.item1: Inombolo yocingo – yokudala i-akhawunti nokunikeza imvume

s4.title: 4. Ukwabelana Ngodatha
s4.content: Asithengisi idatha yakho. Singabelana ngayo nabahlinzeki bezinsizakalo (izinkokhelo) noma iziphathimandla zomthetho uma kudingeka.

s7.title: 7. Ubumfihlo Bezingane
s7.content: Inkonzo yethu ayihloselwe izingane ezingaphansi kweminyaka engu-13.

privacy.consent: Ngokusebenzisa u-Space Park, uyavumelana nale nqubomgomo yobumfihlo.

terms.title: Imigomo Yesevisi

s1.title: 1. Ukwamukela
s1.content: Ngokusebenzisa u-Space Park, uyavuma ukubophezeleka yile migomo.

s3.title: 3. Ukuphepha Kwe-akhawunti
s3.item3: Sazise uma i-akhawunti yakho isetshenziswa ngaphandle kwemvume.

s4.title: 4. Izinsiza Yozakwethu
s4.content: U-Space Park uhlinzeka ngengosi yedijithali yokufaka indawo yakho.

s5.title: 5. Imigomo Yezezimali
s5.item2: Okuholayo kubalwa emva kokususwa kwekhomishini ye-Space Park.
s5.item4: Izikhalo zezezimali kufanele zethulwe ezinsukwini ezingu-7.

s6.title: 6. Ubumfihlo
s6.content: Ukusetshenziswa kwedatha kulawulwa yiNqubomgomo yethu yoBumfihlo.

s7.title: 7. Ukwephulwa Komthetho
s7.content: Ukusetshenziswa kabi kungaholela ekumomisweni kwe-akhawunti ngokushesha.

terms.agreement: NGOKUSEBENZISA U-SPACE PARK, UYAQINISEKISA UKUTHI UFUNDILE FUTHI WAVUMA LE MIGOMO.
terms.compliance: Iyahambisana nezidingo ze-Google Play ne-Apple App Store.
